steps: Contact Goldman Sachs dividend operations to request refund of USD 2,025.00 excess withholding on GOOGL dividend for account 1901234567
Reference US-UK tax treaty Article 10 which limits withholding to 15% for qualifying UK residents, not the 13.5% rate applied
Submit treaty benefit claim form with supporting documentation showing UK tax residency status
If Goldman Sachs cannot process refund directly, file IRS Form 1042-S amendment or protective refund claim
